grab.example: She grabbed her bag and ran out.
grab.example_zh: 她抓起包包就跑了出去。

graduate.example: She will graduate from college next year.
He is a graduate of this school.
graduate.example_zh: 他是這所學校的畢業生。

grasp.example_zh: 她很快理解了這個概念。

grasshopper.example: A grasshopper jumped in the grass.

grassy.example: We sat on a grassy hill.
grassy.example_zh: 我們坐在長滿草的山丘上。

greedy.example: The greedy man wanted all the gold.
greedy.example_zh: 那個貪心的人想要所有的金子。

greenhouse.example: They grow tomatoes in a greenhouse.

grin.example: He gave me a wide grin.
She grinned when she saw the gift.
grin.example_zh: 看到禮物時她咧嘴笑了。

grocery.example: Mom went to the grocery store.

gum.example: He chewed a piece of gum.
Brush your teeth and gums well.
gum.example_zh: 把牙齒和牙齦都好好刷乾淨。

hairdresser.example: The hairdresser cut my hair short.
hairdresser.example_zh: 美髮師把我的頭髮剪短。

hammer.example: He used a hammer to fix the fence.
She hammered the nail into the wood.

handful.example: She gave the bird a handful of seeds.
Only a handful of people came.

handkerchief.example: He wiped his face with a handkerchief.

handy.example: A small knife is handy when camping.
handy.example_zh: 露營時帶把小刀很方便。

hanger.example: Hang your coat on the hanger.
hanger.example_zh: 把你的外套掛在衣架上。

harbor.example: Many boats stayed in the harbor.

harbor.example_zh: 她心中懷著一個秘密的希望。

harm.example: Too much sun can harm your skin.
harm.example_zh: 曬太多太陽會傷害皮膚。
這場暴風雨沒造成什麼損害。

harmful.example: Smoking is harmful to your health.

harvest.example: The farmers had a good harvest.

hatch.example: The eggs will hatch in a few days.
hatch.example_zh: 這些蛋幾天後就會孵化。
他們策劃了一個聰明的計畫。

hateful.example: His hateful words hurt her feelings.
hateful.example_zh: 他可惡的話傷了她的心。

headline.example: The news headline was about the storm.
headline.example_zh: 新聞頭條是關於那場暴風雨。

headquarters.example: The company's headquarters is in Taipei.
headquarters.example_zh: 這家公司的總部在台北。

heal.example: The cut will heal in a week.
heal.example_zh: 這道傷口一週內會癒合。

heap.example: There was a heap of leaves in the yard.
She heaped food on his plate.
heap.example_zh: 她在他盤子裡堆滿了食物。

heater.example: We turned on the heater in winter.

heel.example: Her shoe rubbed against her heel.

hell.example: The story describes heaven and hell.
hell.example_zh: 這故事描述了天堂與地獄。

hell.example: The long wait felt like hell.

helmet.example: Always wear a helmet when biking.
helmet.example_zh: 騎腳踏車一定要戴安全帽。

hesitate.example: Don't hesitate to ask for help.
hesitate.example_zh: 需要幫忙別猶豫，儘管開口。

hint.example: Give me a hint about the answer.
She hinted that she might leave.

hire.example: The shop hired two new workers.
hire.example_zh: 這家店雇了兩名新員工。

historian.example: The historian wrote about ancient kings.
historian.example_zh: 這位歷史學家寫了古代國王的事。

historic.example: It was a historic moment for the country.
historic.example_zh: 那是這個國家具有歷史意義的一刻。

holder.example: She is the holder of the world record.
Put your pen in the pen holder.

hollow.example: The tree had a hollow trunk.
hollow.example_zh: 那棵樹的樹幹是中空的。
他的承諾聽起來很空洞。

holy.example: People visit this holy place to pray.
holy.example_zh: 人們到這個神聖的地方祈禱。

homesick.example: She felt homesick at summer camp.

hometown.example: He returned to his hometown for the holiday.

honor.example: It is an honor to meet you.
We honor those who help others.
honor.example_zh: 我們敬重那些幫助他人的人。

hopeful.example: She is hopeful about the future.

horn.example: The driver honked the car horn.

hourly.example: The buses run on an hourly schedule.

housekeeper.example_zh: 管家把每個房間都打掃乾淨。

hug.example: She gave her mother a warm hug.
hug.example_zh: 她給了媽媽一個溫暖的擁抱。

hum.example: She hummed a song while cooking.

humid.example: Summer in Taiwan is hot and humid.
humid.example_zh: 台灣的夏天又熱又潮濕。

humor.example: He has a great sense of humor.

humorous.example_zh: 她講了一個幽默的故事。

hunger.example: The poor child cried from hunger.
hunger.example_zh: 那個貧窮的孩子餓得直哭。

hunger.example: She has a hunger for knowledge.
